# Bits&Bytes - India's Teen-Led Code Club

> **Mission:** Building India's boldest teen-led hackathons & tech movements  
> **Org Type:** Nonprofit · Teen-Led Code Club · Based in Lucknow, India · Serving teens nationwide
> **Website:** https://gobitsnbytes.org

This file provides context for AI agents and LLM-powered search engines about Bits&Bytes.

## Quick Facts
- **Founded:** 2024
- **Location:** Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India
- **Members:** 200+ active student developers
- **Projects Shipped:** 15+
- **Partner Schools:** 10+
- **Membership Cost:** FREE
- **Age Range:** 13-19 years old

## Core Identity
Bits&Bytes is India's boldest teen-led code club and nonprofit, based in Lucknow but serving ambitious teens nationwide. We empower students to build real-world projects, participate in hackathons, attend workshops, and grow as developers—all for free.

## What We Do
1. **Hackathons**: Organizing flagship events like "Scrapyard Lucknow" where teens build prototypes in 48-hour sprints.
2. **Workshops**: Weekly sessions covering Web Development, AI/ML, Mobile Apps, UI/UX Design, and more.
3. **Projects**: Members ship real products—from web apps to AI tools—with mentorship at every stage.
4. **Community**: A safe, inclusive Discord community for 200+ active members to learn, collaborate, and grow together.

## Key Focus Areas
- Web Development (Next.js, React, TypeScript)
- Mobile App Development (iOS, Android, Cross-platform)
- Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
- UI/UX Design & Design Systems
- Open Source Contribution
- DevOps & Cloud Infrastructure

## Leadership Team
- **Yash**: Co-Founder & Lead Developer – Full-stack dev, AI, web architecture
- **Saksham**: Co-Founder & Designer – UI/UX, design systems, visual identity
- **Aadrika**: Community Lead – Community building, mentoring, event hosting
- **Akshat Kushwaha**: Project Manager – Planning, timelines, coordination
- **Devansh**: Backend Specialist – Databases, APIs, system design
- **Maryam**: Mobile Dev Lead – iOS, Android, cross-platform apps
- **Kaustubh**: DevOps Engineer – Infrastructure, CI/CD, security
- **Fatima**: Content Creator – Docs, tutorials, educational content

## Technology Stack
- **Frontend**: Next.js 14+, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Three.js
- **Backend**: Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, various cloud services
- **Tools**: GitHub, Discord, Vercel, Notion

## How to Join
1. Visit https://gobitsnbytes.org/join
2. Fill out the membership form
3. Join our Discord community
4. Attend weekly workshops and events
5. Start contributing to projects

Requirements: Be a student (ages 13-19), commit 2-4 hours per week, maintain a positive attitude.

## Website Structure
- **/** - Homepage with overview and impact stats
- **/about** - Team profiles and mission details
- **/projects** - Showcase of 15+ teen-built projects
- **/events** - Upcoming hackathons and workshops
- **/impact** - Community statistics and success stories
- **/join** - Free membership application
- **/contact** - Get in touch with the team
- **/faq** - Frequently asked questions
- **/coc** - Code of conduct and community guidelines

## Contact Information
- **Website**: https://gobitsnbytes.org
- **Contact Page**: https://gobitsnbytes.org/contact
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/company/gobitsbytes
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/gobitsnbytes
- **Twitter/X**: @bitsnbytes_lko
- **Location**: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

## Brand Colors
- Deep Purple: #3E1E68 (Primary)
- Rich Plum: #5D2F77 (Accents)
- Vibrant Pink: #E45A92 (Interactive elements)
- Soft Coral: #FFACAC (Backgrounds)
